message:
feat: add CLI bench/legacy/robot commands and TUI theme refinements

Concurrent agent work: expand the CLI toolset and refine the TUI
visual theming:

- cli/bench.rs: add benchmark command infrastructure for performance
  regression testing of mail operations
- cli/legacy.rs: add legacy format migration tooling for backwards-
  compatible data imports
- cli/robot.rs: add robot-mode output commands for machine-readable
  CLI interaction (JSON output for scripting)
- server/tui_theme.rs: refine TUI color palette and style tokens

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
